message:
chore(beads): close franken_numpy-k74v.6, -k74v.7, -4e84

k74v.6: numpy constants (pi, e, euler_gamma, inf, nan, little_endian)
        exposed in fnp_python — commit 3727148.
k74v.7: fnp_python.__version__ exposed via env!(CARGO_PKG_VERSION) —
        commit 3727148.
4e84:   MOCK-AUDIT summary bead resolved now that both enumerated
        followups (5hef, 7qp9) are closed (commit 0761a2d).
